description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern design, featuring a sleek black base and numerous pale pink cushions arranged along the backrest. The lounge is accompanied by two matching black ottomans, each positioned at the ends of the L-shape, and flanked by two potted green plants in geometric metal stands. The base of the lounge and ottomans is illuminated with a blue underglow, adding a contemporary, urban aesthetic. The seating appears plush and comfortable, with a continuous seat cushion and a segmented backrest lined with loose cushions. The overall setup suggests a communal, social seating area suitable for parks, plazas, or upscale urban outdoor environments.
description: A modern, L-shaped black lounge with pink cushions, blue underglow, and matching ottomans, flanked by potted plants in metal stands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, all cushions, both ottomans, and both potted plants clearly.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the depth of the lounge, the arrangement of cushions, and the ottoman on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest, the row of cushions, and both plants at the ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle focusing on the right ottoman, the plant in the foreground, and the lounge's backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Nine loose, rectangular back cushions evenly spaced along the L-shaped backrest, with two additional seat cushions on the ottomans; all cushions are similar in size and color, providing full back and some side support.
attribute_backrest_design: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a straight, segmented structure, lined with loose cushions for added comfort and a modern look.
attribute_armrest_presence: Absent; the lounge has open ends without armrests, enhancing accessibility and modularity.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visibly distinct; the lounge and ottomans appear to have a solid base with a blue illuminated underglow, suggesting a concealed or platform-style support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, untextured finish; cushions are solid pale pink with no visible pattern or tufting.
